memoryArtifacts.headline: John de Cobham bio (According to Wiki)
memoryArtifacts.description: John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham (died 1355) was an English nobleman.[1] He was the second baron of the family of Cobhams of Cobham. He married Joan of Beauchamp, daughter of John Lord Beauchamp; afte …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham於大約1286年出生在英國肯特可巴姆時，他的父親Sir Henry Cobham28歲，母親Maud Moreville11284歲。他於1314年與Joan Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年2月25日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham于大约1286年出生在英国肯特可巴姆时，他的父亲Sir Henry Cobham28岁，母亲Maud Moreville11284岁。他于1314年与Joan Beauchamp结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年2月25日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cobham,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham was born about 1286, in Cobham, Kent, England, his father, Sir Henry Cobham, was 28 and his mother, Maud Moreville, was 11284. He married Joan Beauchamp in 1314. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 February 1355, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham est né environ 1286, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Cobham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud Moreville, avait 11284 ans. Il a épousé Joan Beauchamp en 1314. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 février 1355, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham um 1286 in Cobham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Cobham 28 und seine Mutter Maud Moreville 11284. Er hat 1314 Joan Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Februar 1355 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham è nato il circa 1286 nel Cobham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Cobham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maud Moreville, aveva 11284 anni. Lui sposato Joan Beauchamp nel 1314. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 febbraio 1355, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Cobham, Kent, England.

ja.Cobham, Kent, England: イギリスケントコブハム
ja.lifeSummary: John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobhamが約1286年にイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Cobhamは28歳，母Maud Morevilleは11284歳であった。1314年にJoan Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年2月25日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham(이)가 대략 1286년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Cobham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Moreville(은)는 11284세였다. 그는 1314년 Joan Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 2월 25일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham nasceu aproximadamente 1286, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Cobham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud Moreville, tinha 11284 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Beauchamp em 1314. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1355, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham родился около 1286 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Cobham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Moreville, 11284. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Beauchamp в 1314 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 февраля 1355 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham nació aproximadamente 1286, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Cobham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maud Moreville, tenía 11284 años. Se casó con Joan Beauchamp en 1314. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1355, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.
